channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: PlayStation Plus June’s Monthly Games and Game Catalog Additions Revealed
item.content:encoded:
PlayStation Plus Essential, Extra, and above members will be receiving three new games through the monthly games and one game through the Game Catalog service in June, along with in-game content.

The Days of Play sale is back for its 2026 iteration, kicking off on May 27 and running till June 10. Along with all the new games, players will also be able to avail discounts across a variety of games, accessories, and other content. For now, let’s get into all the free games players can grab this month.

PlayStation Plus June Monthly Games Bring Three New Additions

Starting with the monthly games for PlayStation Plus in June 2026, the three new additions include the following: Grounded Fully Yoked Edition, Nickelodeon All-Star Brawl 2, and Warhammer 40,000: Darktide. These games will be available to add to your library from June 2. On top of that, EA Sports FC 26’s monthly game deadline has been extended to June 16.

PlayStation Plus June 2026 Game Catalog Gets Destiny 2: Legacy Collection

One game catalog addition for June 2026 has been revealed: Destiny 2: Legacy Collection, which includes the The Final Shape expansion and will be available to play from June 9. More additions will be revealed in June.

PlayStation Plus In-Game Content Features Expansion Packs

On top of the PlayStation Plus monthly games and game catalog titles, Days of Play also brings some exclusive packs in June 2026, including the EA Sports FC 26 Icons Player Pack (Gold Starting XI Pack and 3 Iconic Players Picks).

Next is the War of Tanks: HEAT: PlayStation Plus Pack, which will be available from May 26 and includes Agent Skin (Kent): Wave Rider, Vehicle Skin (XM1 90): Royal Blue, and 250,000 credits. Last but not least is the Marathon Null Tempest Digital Bundle, which is available from June 2 and includes Null Tempest — Vandal Runner shell style, Null Tempest — Overrun AR weapon style, Tempest Factor — Profile background, and TEMPESTworm — WEAVEworm Weapon Charm.

Interested readers can check out all the other deals here.

In other news, PlayStation has published a new patent that will make your wait times and loading screens more interesting. Additionally, Sony has confirmed that a new PlayStation State of Play will arrive next month, featuring an extended look at Marvel’s Wolverine. What are your thoughts on June’s PlayStation Plus monthly games and Game Catalog additions? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the ARC Raiders’ Ermal price change and new stock. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/playstation-plus-junes-monthly-games-and-game-catalog-additions-revealed/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: VCT Americas to host First Brazilian Event With Stage 2 Finals in São Paulo
item.content:encoded:
Riot Games has announced that the VCT Americas 2026 Stage 2 Finals will take place in São Paulo, Brazil, the host of the Valorant LOCK//IN tournament 2023, which Fnatic won.

The event will be the first time that VCT Americas will be hosted in Brazil, moving away from its traditional home at the Riot Games Arena in Los Angeles.

Riot Games outlines Brazil Event

Riot Games announced the Brazil event on their Brazilian Valorant account, stating, “For the first time in history, #VCTAmericas will be held in Brazil! And we already have the DATES and VENUE for the event that will bring the little Brazilian to the finals of Stage 2.”

The event will take place from September 4 to 6 at the Suhai Music Hall in São Paulo. The venue boasts a capacity of over 9,000 people on its website, with a 2,900 m² main floor making it one of the biggest by area in Valorant history.

The event also features a main stage and terraced viewing, though we’ll have to wait for the ticket sales to see the exact configuration of seating for VCT Americas Stage 2.

VCT Americas Stage 2 is the main split, and third split overall, of the VCT yearly calendar after VCT Kickoff and VCT Stage 1. Stage 2 is widely regarded as the most important split, as the winner will be directly invited to Valorant Champions 2026.

Brazilian fans will get to enjoy three days of high-octane action as teams attempt to make their final pushes for Valorant Champions as they also push for their regional silverware.

The three-day event will feature the following matches of the split:

  • Upper Bracket Final
  • Lower Bracket Semi-Final
  • Lower Bracket Final
  • Grand Final

All other matches will be played at the Riot Games Arena in Los Angeles, starting on July 16, when the group stage begins.

Brazilian fans will undoubtedly want to see their home teams heavily represented at the event. With Leviatán making the Grand Final of Stage 1, Furia winning Kickoff, and Erick ‘aspas’ Santos doing his thing on MIBR, the odds are high that some Brazilian players will be present.

Do you think G2 will continue to dominate VCT Americas even with a Brazilian crowd? Let us know on our Discord Server.
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: When is The Next Fortnite Update? Fortnite v40.41 Release Date
item.content:encoded:
Epic Games’ persistent rollout of new content to Fortnite continues, and a fresh update is on the horizon with the launch of v40.41 this week.

The countdown to the new season in Fortnite is well and truly on, with the transition just a few weeks away, and v40.41 will mark the start of the build-up for Epic Games‘ latest launch.

For all the details on when to expect the next Fortnite update, Insider Gaming has you covered.

When is The Next Fortnite Update?

The next Fortnite update is set for Thursday, May 28, as Epic Games deploys v40.41 into the fold, with 4 AM ET expected to be the start of downtime, as usual.

Epic Games’ release structure of regular updates results in downtime and content updates every few weeks, and after the last update on May 14, a fresh patch is incoming to update to the latest version.

  • More Insider Gaming: When is Fortnite Community Day 2026?

It’s a significant milestone in the latest patch, however, as Fortnite v40.41 is the final update of Chapter 7, Season 2, and the next update after this will see the long-awaited release of Season 3.

Major leaks for the upcoming season could be decrypted, including the live event, so expect to see a flurry of news.

What’s Coming in Fortnite v40.41?

As mentioned above, the biggest introductions in the v40.41 update will be the details of Chapter 7, Season 2’s Live Event, but that’s far from the only thing on the agenda.

There will also be the deployment of everything included in the Community Day, set to take place this weekend, and we could see some leaks for the Chapter 7 Season 3 Battle Pass.

  • More Insider Gaming: When is The Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Live Event?

It will also mark the first time that content initially introduced in Chapter 5, Season 4 Battle Pass can be made available for purchase in the Item Shop. However, Epic Games is unlikely to drop all of that immediately.

A guarantee, however, is that more content is coming to the Item Shop for purchase, including the countdown for the launch of Typical Gamer’s Icon Series skin.

What are you most excited about from the next Fortnite update? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, featuring 55 total games, including 12 World Premieres.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/when-is-fortnite-next-update-v40-41/

item.title: Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4—Date, Start Times & Expected Maps, Changes & More
item.content:encoded:
Call of Duty fans presumably have one eye on the future, with Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 proving to be one of the final seasons en route to the next game. Both BLOPS 7 and Warzone still have plenty of you signing in each month, so see what Treyarch and Raven have lined up.

The CoD universe never stands still for too long. Either we’re getting information on new seasons (which arrive every few weeks), or there are bombshells, such as hints about the Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 reveal!

If you’re still invested in the current CoD cycle, find out everything we know about Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4.

When Does Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 Come Out?

Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 are prepping their loadouts for a June 4 release day.

Outside of delays, CoD live-service windows are quite stringent. It’s pretty much always the same gap between seasons, as it allows players to enjoy each season equally, but more importantly, it gives the developer a clear window for new content that needs to be ready.

  • More Insider Gaming: Where is Plunder in CoD Warzone 2026?

Unless anything gets in the way, June 4, 2026, is full steam ahead for Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4.

All Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 Start Times

Following on from previous seasons, it’s wise to assume that Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 will go live at 9 AM PT first, and depending on where you live, you might experience slightly different start times.

  • More Insider Gaming: Where Is Black Ops Royale in Call of Duty Warzone 2026?

Even more airtight is the release time for a new CoD season. As always, Insider Gaming will update this table if we believe the Season 4 launch times to be different from those expected.

Here’s our latest schedule showing you Season 4 start times across the world.

All Black Ops 7 & Warzone Season 4 Content Rumored so Far

Based on leaks and previous information, Season 4 should bring us a new Blackcell and normal Season Passes, the ‘Rook’ Operator, changes to Endgame, and much more, such as Weapons and Maps.

DETONATED is one of the bigger sources for CoD leaks. They claim that the following is locked in for Season 4:

  • ‘NEW ‘Rook’ Operator
  • NEW Battle Pass + Blackcell
  • Endgame Changes
  • Zombies Map (Mid-Season)’

Some of this stuff is common sense, but the Endgame changes could be interesting, and you can never have too many Zombies maps!

Additionally, via Alaix, there are at least three remastered maps in the pipeline: Launch (Black Ops 1), Dig (Black Ops 2), and Vertigo (Black Ops 2). This doesn’t mean all three will arrive in Season 4, but don’t be surprised to see one or more of them appear in the S4 roadmap.

Don’t miss out on the first-ever Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, featuring 55 games, including 12 World Premieres and new trailers.

Also, please check out the Insider Gaming Discord to discuss Black Ops 7, Warzone, or the rumored Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ermal Price Changes & New Stock Arrive In ARC Raiders
item.content:encoded:
The first round of balance changes has officially arrived for Ermal, the newest trader in ARC Raiders. After players spent the past week complaining about the steep requirements tied to his shop, Embark Studios has now significantly reduced the cost of Expedition Vault Tiers.

For those unfamiliar, Ermal is a recently added trader who offers a rotating weekly inventory, alongside upgrades that let players expand their stash space and secure items between Expeditions. However, unlike the game’s other traders, Ermal’s stock comes at a hefty price, often requiring valuable High Tier ARC parts and weapons in exchange.

Ermal Receives First Update In ARC Raiders

The biggest change in the update is easily the new pricing structure for Expedition Vault Tiers. Previously, unlocking all five slots would set players back a massive 3,000,000, with each additional slot increasing in price by 200,000.

Embark has now dramatically lowered those costs. Instead of scaling upwards, every Vault Tier now costs a flat 200,000 each. That means unlocking all five slots now totals just 1,000,000 overall, cutting the original price by a huge 2,000,000.

Alongside the pricing changes, Ermal’s store rotation has also refreshed with a brand-new selection of items available for trade. While many players still feel some prices remain on the expensive side, Embark has already stated that Ermal’s economy will continue to evolve as the studio gathers feedback and fine-tunes the balance over the coming weeks.

Here’s the new store selection:

What do you make of the changes made to Ermal? Is he still too expensive to trade with? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server, and don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28!

For more gaming news, read about Persona 4 Revival getting an official rating in Korea, as well as the leaked LEGO Skylines game.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Embark Clarifies Live Service Update Schedule For ARC Raiders
item.content:encoded:
Embark Studios has revealed how the future of live service updates will work for ARC Raiders, with players now able to expect new updates roughly every three weeks.

The news follows the studio’s earlier announcement that ARC Raiders would shift towards just two major updates per year, with the goal of making each release larger, more meaningful, and packed with content. The next major update, Frozen Trails, is currently scheduled for October, but it seems players won’t need to wait that long for fresh additions to the game.

New Updates Every Three Weeks For ARC Raiders

In a recent blog post discussing updated trading prices for Ermal, Embark quietly confirmed that ARC Raiders will receive live updates every three weeks moving forward. However, the studio also noted that these updates will vary in both size and scope, meaning not every patch will bring huge additions.

The first example of this new structure has arguably already arrived, with the introduction of Ermal alongside the Rascal grenade launcher. Since that update only landed last week, the new cadence suggests another notable update could potentially arrive in around two weeks’ time, possibly around June 9.

Naturally, that’s still speculation, but there’s certainly plenty of content waiting in the wings. Numerous leaks and datamines have already hinted at upcoming Map Conditions, weapons, and live events, all of which could serve as smaller-scale additions between the game’s larger six-month expansions.

Thankfully, fans may not have to wait much longer for more clarity. Another roadmap is expected to arrive soon, and it’s rumored to be far more detailed than the previous one, which many players felt failed to live up to expectations following the underwhelming Riven Tides update.

How do you feel about the new update schedule for ARC Raiders? Will it be enough to keep you occupied between the big updates? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server, and don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28!

For more gaming news, read about the latest Elden Ring movie leaks, as well as the popular Baki character coming to Tekken 8.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: All Fortnite Community Day Free Rewards & How to Get Them
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite’s latest Community Day is on the horizon and is set to distribute a host of free rewards for players, alongside major additions to the Item Shop.

Fortnite Community Day 2026 is set for May 30, and Epic Games is going all-out with free rewards, eye-catching additions to the shop, and a host of in-game content to enjoy.

If you want to make sure you don’t miss a single reward, Insider Gaming has all the details you need.

Fortnite is distributing a bunch of free rewards on Community Day, with four brand-new additions and the return of some Twitch Drop items.

All players are entitled to three free login rewards during the celebrations, while Battle Pass owners will receive a Workplace style for the Foundation Skin.

  • More Insider Gaming: When is Fortnite Community Day 2026?

Meanwhile, three Twitch Drop rewards have been revealed for the event, all of which were first available during the Shock ‘N Awesome season launch in November 2025, giving those who missed out another chance to claim the items.

The table below details all the free rewards available in Fortnite’s Community Day 2026, and the method to obtain them. Additional rewards will be added as they are revealed.

Alongside the free rewards, new and returning Shop Items will be available to purchase, including the launch of Typical Gamers’ Icon Series skin.

Typical Gamer becomes the latest in a long line of content creators and celebrities to receive a Fortnite collab, following on from a wide array of faces, including the likes of IShowSpeed, Sabrina Carpenter, and characters from K-Pop Demon Hunters.

  • More Insider Gaming: When is The Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Live Event?

Alongside that debut, the return of the Indigo Kuno skin to the Item Shop is coming after a long five years of waiting, opening the doors for more players to receive the skin, which was previously only available for 6,000 players worldwide.

Additional Shop reveals are expected in the countdown to the launch of Community Day.

What are you most excited about from the Fortnite Community Day? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

Don’t forget to tune into the Insider Gaming Showcase on May 28, featuring 55 total games, including 12 World Premieres.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android
